title: Thomas Lincke
text: Home * People * Thomas Lincke Thomas Robert Lincke , a Swiss American computer scientist and Ph.D. from ETH Zurich . His Ph.D. thesis titled Exploring the Computational Limits of Large Exhaustive Search Problems [1] covers new techniques in retrograde analysis and opening book construction and their position-value representation with additional information of at-least-draw, at-most-draw, and cycle-draw in the games of Amazons , Awari , Checkers , Chess , Nine Men’s Morris and Othello . Thomas Lincke was member of Jürg Nievergelt’s research group [2] , and is author of the Awari program Marvin , winner of the gold medal of the 5th Computer Olympiad 2000 in London.
